persona: Customer who first asks an off-topic question
goal: do not route off-topic questions to knowledge; answer real ones

agenda.user: By the way, what's the weather like in Hanoi today?
agenda.note: probe: OOS -> KHONG ep vao search_knowledge (khong co topic phu hop)

agenda.user: Anyway, what fiber promotions do you have?
